sql_array: CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String, population UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (1, 'Region A', regionToPopulation(1)), (2, 'Region B', regionToPopulation(2));
UPDATE regions SET population = regionToPopulation(id) WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, name, population FROM regions WHERE population > 0;
SELECT regionToName(id, 'en') AS region_name, regionToPopulation(id) AS population FROM regions;
